FINDING: services/api/src/brDeck/mutations.ts:316:BLOCKING
WHAT: `deleteBrDeckJob` only checks `userCanAccessBrDeck(ctx.user)` before proceeding. any account admin can delete other orgs' jobs (IDOR). missing org-scope check.
EVIDENCE: mutations.ts:316
IMPACT: cross-org data deletion
OPTIONS:
1. add ensureAccountAdminCanAccessBrDeckOrg
UNVERIFIABLE: no
